Candidates Who Are Eligible to Take the 2023-2024 KHAS Theater Department Special Talent Exam (50 Percent Scholarship Additional Quota)

IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ADDITIONAL QUOTA EXAM

The Theater Department additional quota exam will start on Wednesday, September 13, 2023, at 10.00. All candidates are expected to be at Sahne KHas (Kadir Has University – Cibali Campus), where the exam will take place, at 10:00. Candidates must be in the area at least 30 minutes before the exam time.

Click

for the List of Candidates Eligible to Take the 2023-2024 KHAS Theater Department Special Talent Exam (50 Percent Scholarship Additional Quota).

Candidates will be admitted in order. You should not lose your candidate numbers assigned to you during your application.

Our exam is only open to 50% scholarship candidates.

The exam consists of a drama, a comedy and a song.

Candidates must have their identity cards with them during the exam.

Candidates prepared in advance,

with a drama (monologue)

They perform a comedy piece (monologue) on stage in front of the jury and

they sing a song.

Important notes:

No special vocal work is required for the song. There is no accompaniment with recorded music or piano. Candidates sing a song they like in any musical genre, however they want. We recommend that you choose a song you like rather than a singing or musical piece. For example, we would like to hear a song you enjoy singing in the shower.

Drama, comedy and song should not be longer than 3 minutes each.

The jury may conduct additional studies with the candidates during the exam.

We have experienced that some parts do not help our candidates during the exam. Below is the list of parts that we do not

recommend

you choose:

Ariel Dorfman,

Death and the Girl,

Paulina

The Sad Comedy of Don Cristobita and Dona Rosita

, The Mosquito
